title: PurchaseOrder
description: A complete purchase order document representing a buyer's commitment to purchase goods or services from a supplier through the SAP Ariba Network

orderId.description: Unique purchase order identifier (UniqueName) including version

erpPONumber.description: ERP system purchase order number. Unique ID for every version of the purchase order in the backend ERP system.

versionNumber.description: Supplemental version number of the order. Incremented with each change request.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the purchase order was created

orderMethodCategory.description: Ordering method category indicating how the order was generated (e.g., manual, automatic, blanket release)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the order

companyCode.description: Company code for the buying entity

lineItems.description: Line items contained in the purchase order

requisitionId.description: Reference to the originating purchase requisition

contractId.description: Reference to a master agreement or contract

comments.description: Header-level comments on the purchase order

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the order was first created

lastModifiedDate.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification

closedDate.description: Timestamp when the order was closed
